opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The burning in my lower back is relentless, painkillers do absolutely nothing, and I cannot take it anymore.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My back has flared up horribly since yesterday, I'm panicking and can't settle, and nothing I take is touching it — I need help tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: it kicked off about a day ago after I did something pretty minor
symptom_narrative.duration: around 24 hours of it being really bad now, but I've had this back trouble for a long time
symptom_narrative.character: a burning, raw feeling that's spread all across my lower back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it's unbearable — even the lightest touch on my back feels like it's on fire
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my lower back, it doesn't stay in one spot, it kind of spreads
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: pretty much constant, I can't find any position that helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: even light touch or trying to keep still, it's all awful
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the pain and feeling completely wound up and panicky — I'm exhausted
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this back pain for years, they told me a scan didn't really explain how bad it feels
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can walk but I can't sit or lie still, I keep pacing because I can't get comfortable

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing lower back pain that's worse than any scan explains
past_medical_history.how_managed: painkillers and just getting through the flares

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taken the most the packet allows today
maxed out the daily dose on the packet

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I'm on my own tonight and really at the end of my tether — I've got boxes of painkillers out and I keep thinking about whether taking more would help, even though I know I've hit the limit

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading taken while in severe pain and panic — likely elevated by distress
may reflect pain/anxiety rather than resting rate

objective_data_offered.value: about 22 breaths a minute, I'm breathing fast
